# terrible_community_general_gitlab_issue (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `project` (String) The path or name of the project.
- `title` (String) A title for the issue. The title is used as a unique identifier to ensure idempotency.

### Optional

- `assignee_ids` (String) A list of assignee usernames omitting `@` character. Set to an empty array to unassign all assignees.
- `description` (String) A description of the issue. Gets overridden by a content of file specified at `description_path`, if found.
- `description_path` (String) A path of file containing issue's description. Accepts MarkDown formatted files.
- `issue_type` (String) Type of the issue.
- `labels` (String) A list of label names. Set to an empty array to remove all labels.
- `milestone_group_id` (String) The path or numeric ID of the group hosting desired milestone.
- `milestone_search` (String) The name of the milestone. Set to empty string to unassign milestone.
- `state` (String) Create or delete issue.
- `state_filter` (String) Filter specifying state of issues while searching.

### Read-Only

- `issue` (String) API object.
- `msg` (String) Success or failure message.
